title: Targa (TRGP) Stock Shines SInce Q2 Earnings Beat: Here's Why
text: Targa Resources (TRGP) paid out a dividend of 35 cents per share, while adjusted free cash flow rose 30.5% from the second quarter of 2021 to $334.1 million.

title: Targa Resources Corp. to Participate in Investor Conferences
text: HOUSTON, Aug. 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced today that representatives from the Company will participate in investor meetings at the following investor conferences:

title: Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) Is Attractively Priced Despite Fast-paced Momentum
text: Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) made it through our 'Fast-Paced Momentum at a Bargain' screen and could be a great choice for investors looking for stocks that have gained strong momentum recently but are still trading at reasonable prices.

title: 3 Stocks to Leverage Strong Refining & Marketing MLP Fundamentals
text: With refining margins on a tear, the Zacks Oil and Gas - Refining & Marketing MLP operators like TRGP, CLMT and GLP should enjoy plenty of upside momentum.

title: Targa Resources Corp (TRGP) CEO Matt Meloy on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Targa Resources Corp (NYSE:TRGP ) Q2 2022 Results Conference Call August 4, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Sanjay Lad - Vice President, Finance and Investor Relations Matt Meloy - Chief Executive Officer Jen Kneale - Chief Financial Officer Pat McDonie - President, Gathering and Processing Scott Pryor - President, Logistics & Transportation Bobby Muraro - Chief Commercial Officer Conference Call Participants Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Brian Reynolds - UBS Keith Stanley - Wolfe Research Colton Bean - Tudor, Pickering & Holt Neal Dingmann - Truist Securities Danny Peak - Truist Securities Chase Mulvehill - Bank of America Sunil Sibal - Seaport Global Securities John Mackay - Goldman Sachs Michael Cusimano - Pickering Energy Partners Operator Good day, and welcome to the Targa Resources Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: Midstream Weekly Recap: Midstream Equities Soar, Energy Sector Posts Record Earnings
text: Midstream surged 7.3% higher during the week, with every midstream equity in our coverage universe posting a gain. Second-quarter energy sector earnings are hitting records.

title: Strong Permian Outlook Favorable for Midstream
text: Summary The Permian's abundant resources, favorable economics, established infrastructure, and relative proximity to end markets will result in continued volume growth. While some of the largest public Permian producers are only growing modestly, the integrated majors and private exploration and production companies will play a significant role in driving production growth.
